sizing_rule.note: Execute plan at 100% specified size. Increase by 10% after 5 consecutive profitable trades. Cap cumulative increases at 50%. Enforce 25% drawdown limit as safety valve. Primary signal: maintain consistency despite psychological pressure; sizing adjustment rewards winning streaks while bounded by drawdown protection.

source_rule_text: A trader must execute their mechanical trading plan consistently despite psychological discouragement, because missing the biggest trades of the year often results in unprofitable years regardless of edge quality.
